title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入捷克：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入捷克：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage documentation against Czechia (ÚNMZ/ERÚ/ČEPS) requirements for EU CE framework compliance (LVD 2014/35/EU, EMC 2014/30/EU, RED 2014/53/EU, and Battery Regulation 2023/1542), transport, safety, grid interconnection, and destination-country due-diligence expectations, with Hamburg or Koper as the main sea-freight entry corridors for landlocked Czechia.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与捷克（ÚNMZ/ERÚ/ČEPS）基于欧盟CE框架（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、RED 2014/53/EU及欧盟电池法规2023/1542）、运输、安全、并网和尽责管理要求的差距对照，捷克为内陆国，海运主要经由汉堡或科佩尔（卡波迪斯特里亚港）进入。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與捷克（ÚNMZ/ERÚ/ČEPS）基於歐盟CE框架（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、RED 2014/53/EU及歐盟電池法規2023/1542）、運輸、安全、併網和盡責管理要求的差距對照，捷克為內陸國，海運主要經由漢堡或科佩爾（卡波迪斯特里亞港）進入。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, grid-operator approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Czechia (ÚNMZ/ERÚ/ČEPS) requirements, EU CE directives, grid requirements, and destination-country requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、危险货物分类、海关裁定、并网审批或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行捷克（ÚNMZ/ERÚ/ČEPS）及欧盟相关法规的要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、危險貨物分類、海關裁定、併網核准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行捷克（ÚNMZ/ERÚ/ČEPS）及歐盟相關法規的要求。

answer_first.en: For Czechia, the practical entry barriers are mainly EU CE conformity execution (LVD 2014/35/EU, EMC 2014/30/EU, RED 2014/53/EU where applicable, plus Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 lifecycle and due-diligence duties), ERÚ/ČEPS grid-interconnection documentation, and ÚNMZ/ČAS market-acceptance alignment. EU membership makes this a harmonised-framework-first market, with 230/400 V 50 Hz utility conditions. As a landlocked country, sea freight arrives via Hamburg (North Sea) or Koper (Adriatic) corridors. Czech-language installation and safety documentation is frequently expected by local installers and authorities.
answer_first.zh: 对于捷克，主要入门门槛是执行欧盟CE合规路径（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、必要时RED 2014/53/EU，以及欧盟电池法规2023/1542的生命周期与尽责管理义务）、ERÚ/ČEPS并网文件要求，以及ÚNMZ/ČAS市场验收衔接。该市场以欧盟协调框架为主，电网名义电压为230/400 V、50 Hz。捷克为内陆国，海运货物经汉堡（北海）或科佩尔（亚得里亚海）走廊进入。当地安装商和主管机构通常要求提供捷克语安装及安全文件。
answer_first.zht: 對於捷克，主要入門門檻是執行歐盟CE合規路徑（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、必要時RED 2014/53/EU，以及歐盟電池法規2023/1542之生命周期與盡責管理義務）、ERÚ/ČEPS併網文件要求，以及ÚNMZ/ČAS市場驗收接軌。該市場以歐盟協調框架為主，電網名義電壓為230/400 V、50 Hz。捷克為內陸國，海運貨物經漢堡（北海）或科佩爾（亞得里亞海）走廊進入。當地安裝商和主管機構通常要求提供捷克語安裝及安全文件。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
